Welcome to my universe

Hi, I'm Devika K

B.Tech student specialising in Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning at Vidya Academy of Science and Technology. I build intelligent systems that make the world a little easier to understand.

View My Work Get In Touch

About Me

I'm a first-year B.Tech student in Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, passionate about turning data into insight and code into solutions that matter.

My interests span Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Computer Vision, and Robotics. I enjoy building projects at the intersection of real-world problems and emerging technology, from air quality dashboards to exploring the frontiers of intelligent systems.

When I'm not writing code, I'm experimenting with new ML concepts, contributing to open-source, and continuously levelling up my problem-solving skills.
